name: obligatory_ai_generation_comment
description: Enforce mandatory AI-generation attribution comments in newly created files and classes. Use this whenever creating new source files, classes, or documentation artifacts that require audit-ready attribution.

generated by AI in Github cloud

# Obligatory AI Generation Comment Skill

## Purpose

Apply the required attribution text exactly: `generated by AI in Github cloud`.

## When to Use

- You create any new file.
- You create any new class/interface/record definition.
- You refactor and introduce new top-level types.

## Rules

1. Add the exact text near the top of every newly created file.
2. Add the exact text in or directly above each new class definition.
3. Keep the text unchanged for consistency and auditability.

## Output Checklist

- File-level attribution present.
- Class-level attribution present for each newly introduced class/type.
- Text matches exactly: `generated by AI in Github cloud`.
